). Ne modifier que si ce port est déjà u: ). Change only if this port is already in use.
Affiche \"en train d'écrire…\" (ou \"enr: Displays "typing…" (or "recording…" for audio) for ~1s before each automatic send. Makes Jeedom messages more natural.
Ajouté à chaque message envoyé par Jeedo: Added to each message sent by Jeedom in the group. Allows distinguishing Jeedom messages from member messages.
Archive de restauration invalide : chemi: Invalid restore archive: suspicious path detected (
Associe un numéro d'expéditeur à un prof: Associates a sender number with a Jeedom profile. One line per mapping in the format number=profile. The resolved profile is exposed in the info command "Sender — profile" and passed to the interactions engine (compatible with the Profiles plugin). Numbers normalized to international format.
Aucun compte configuré. Cliquez sur \"Aj: No account configured. Click "Add" to get started.
Aucun message dans le pool pour ce filtr: No message in the pool for this filter
Aucun token généré. Cliquez sur le bouto: No token generated. Click the button below to activate the webhook.
Aucune session à sauvegarder (équipement: No session to back up (device never connected?)
This name identifies the account in Jeedom. It can be changed later.
This plugin is free and open-source.
Champ Titre = numéro destinataire, champ: Title field = recipient number, Message field = notification text.
Dans un scénario, utilisez la commande: In a scenario, use the command
Déchiffrement impossible — phrase de pas: Decryption failed — wrong passphrase or corrupted file
Définissez ici des messages réutilisable: Define reusable messages here. One line per template in the format
Désactiver le webhook ? Toutes les intég: Disable the webhook? All integrations using this token will stop working.
Erreur daemon — vérifiez l'onglet Analys: Daemon error — check Analysis → Logs → jeewhatsapp
Fichier audio introuvable ou non lisible: Audio file not found or unreadable
Groupes WhatsApp supplémentaires que cet: Additional WhatsApp groups this device can listen to and target, in addition to the main canal group. One line per group in the format tag=Exact WhatsApp group name. The "tag" is used to target the group via the command "Send to additional group" (Title field) and appears in the info command "Last group".
Générer un nouveau token ? L'ancien ne f: Generate a new token? The old one will stop working.
Impossible de démarrer le daemon après: Unable to start the daemon after
Impossible de joindre le daemon — relanc: Unable to reach the daemon — restart it via Plugins → JeeWhatsApp → Start daemon
Instance non démarrée — redémarrez le da: Instance not started — restart the daemon to include this equipment
JID renseigné automatiquement après rech: JID filled automatically after search or creation. Save afterwards.
JeeWhatsApp est compatible. Sélectionnez: JeeWhatsApp is compatible. Select the command
Laisser vide pour le groupe canal — ou n: Leave empty for canal group — or direct number e.g. 33612345678
Le champ « Titre » = numéro destinataire: The Title field = recipient number (leave empty = canal group).
Les lignes vides et celles commençant pa: Empty lines and those starting with
Média introuvable ou accès refusé: Media not found or access denied
Nom exact du groupe WhatsApp utilisé com: Exact name of the WhatsApp group used as communication channel. The 'Icon' button sets the plugin icon as the group photo (requires the linked WhatsApp account to be group admin).
Notifie le membre mentionné — ne fonctio: Notifies the mentioned member — only works if Jeedom uses a dedicated account (not your personal account)
Optionnel. Nom d'un modèle de voix Piper: Optional. Name of a Piper voice model present in resources/piper/voices/, or absolute path to a .onnx file. Leave empty to use the default French voice.
Opérations d'administration sur le group: Administration operations on the canal group. The linked WhatsApp account must be administrator of the group. Icon change is done via the 'Icon' button above.
Port HTTP local du daemon Baileys (défau: Local HTTP port of the Baileys daemon (default:
Quitter ce groupe WhatsApp ? Cette actio: Leave this WhatsApp group? This action is irreversible.
Raccourcis rapides déclenchés par un mes: Quick shortcuts triggered by a message starting with « / ». One line per shortcut in the format /trigger=target. The target can be: a single command #id# (action → executed and confirmed; info → its value is returned), or a template text containing info tags #id# and variables #args# (arguments) / #1#, #2#… (argument words). Has priority over the interactions engine.
Rechercher ce groupe dans vos groupes Wh: Search for this group in your WhatsApp groups
Restaurer cette session écrasera la sess: Restoring this session will overwrite the current session and restart the daemon. Continue?
Répond automatiquement aux messages reçu: Automatically replies to messages received in the group via the Jeedom interaction engine
Sauvegarde chiffrée (AES-256) de la sess: Encrypted (AES-256) backup of the WhatsApp session to restore it after reinstallation, without re-scanning the QR code. The same passphrase is required to restore. Restoring overwrites the current session (the old one is kept as .bak) and restarts the daemon.
Sauvegarde téléchargée — conservez le fi: Backup downloaded — keep the file and passphrase in a safe place
Sauvegardez l'équipement avant de créer: Save equipment before creating a group
Sauvegardez l'équipement avant de recher: Save equipment before searching the group
Session expirée — redémarrez le daemon p: Session expired — restart the daemon to get a new QR code
Session expirée — un nouveau QR code app: Session expired — a new QR code will appear automatically. Scan it to reconnect.
Session restaurée — démon redémarré. Vér: Session restored — daemon restarted. Check connection status.
Si activé, le texte des images reçues es: If enabled, text from received images is automatically extracted via Tesseract and exposed in the info command "OCR — image text" (last_ocr_text). Useful for reading a meter, a receipt, a sign… Tesseract language: fra by default, combinable (fra+eng). Silent failure if Tesseract is absent.
Si activé, les notes vocales reçues sont: If enabled, received voice notes are transcribed to text (Vosk, offline) and exposed in the info command "STT — voice note" (last_voice_text). The text is also re-injected as a message: it triggers shortcuts and Jeedom interactions — you can control Jeedom by voice. Combined with "Voice replies" mode, you get a complete voice assistant.
Si activé, les réponses automatiques aux: If enabled, automatic replies to interactions and shortcuts are sent as a synthesized voice note (Piper). Automatic fallback to text if synthesis fails. The action command "Send a voice note" remains available independently of this checkbox.
Si activé, tous les messages envoyés par: If enabled, all messages sent by Jeedom automatically disappear after the chosen duration (WhatsApp "ephemeral messages" feature).
Si renseigné, seuls les messages commenç: If set, only messages starting with this keyword trigger interactions. The keyword is removed from the message before processing. Case-insensitive.
Si renseignée, seuls les numéros listés: If set, only the listed numbers can trigger Jeedom interactions. One number per line (or separated by commas). Accepted formats: 0612345678, 33612345678, +33 6 12 34 56 78 — all normalized to international format.
Si vous l'appréciez, offrez moi un café: If you like it, buy me a coffee!
Statut vide : fournir un texte ou une im: Empty status: provide a text or an image
Synthèse vocale indisponible : Piper non: TTS unavailable: Piper not installed (resources/piper/tts.sh missing)
Token généré avec 256 bits d'entropie (b: Token generated with 256 bits of entropy. Immediate revocation by clicking Regenerate. Keep this token safe — it allows sending WhatsApp messages.
Transcription indisponible : Vosk non in: Transcription unavailable: Vosk not installed (resources/stt/stt.py missing)
Un don, même modeste, aide à financer le: Even a small donation helps fund development time, testing and updates. Thank you!
Une fois par mois, à un jour et une heur: Once a month, on a random day and time (between 10am and 7pm), a discreet support reminder is sent in the canal group. Drawn from a pool of 12 messages prepared by the author. Disabled by default.
Utiliser l'icône du plugin comme photo d: Use the plugin icon as the group photo (the account must be group admin)
WhatsApp → Appareils liés → Lier un appa: WhatsApp → Linked devices → Link a device
WhatsApp → ⋮ → Appareils liés → Lier un: WhatsApp → ⋮ → Linked devices → Link a device
comme destination dans votre profil Noti: as destination in your Notification Manager profile.
est directement utilisable comme destina: can be used directly as a destination in the plugin
et saisissez la clé dans le champ \"Mess: and enter the key in the "Message" field.
une ligne par template, clé insensible à: one line per template, case-insensitive key
